entry.title: How to restrict F4 value help values in webi?
entry.content:
If there are large number of values in F4 value,
help how can we restrict the number of values in F4 help?

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud data label total missing
entry.content:
Hi 

(Regarding Optimized story on live connection to BW 7.5)

On left picture Totals are not shown. Removing the checkmark as shown in Styling, return the totals in second printscreen. However, then the detailed labels are overlapping.

Do anyone know, how I can show totals only on the first printscreen in the 2 blue boxes? In other words, this 'Avoid Data Label Overlap' should not remove the total. Is there a way?

thx

entry.title: Re: Sales Order price is updated from sales contract afte...
entry.content:
Hi @thangarajthomas ,
Could you please provide some more information about your custom logic? How did you implemented what and which apps have you used? I do not know the screenshot you provided.
I have tried to reproduce your scenario with a standard condition DRV1 in the contract and the discount is still there in the sales order even after approval.

entry.title: Re: Multiple other bank replication from EC to ECP issue
entry.content: How did you fix it, Raid? Kindly describe.

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud for planning - Advanced Formula "LINK" is not working
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I duplicated a planning model and now want to transfer the values from the productive model to the backup model using a Data Action with the LINK function. However, it's not copying any values. What could I be overlooking?

DATA() = LINK([PlanModel] , [d/Version]="public.Forecast", [d/Measures]="Amount")

 Kind regards,

Ismail

entry.title: boot for migration
entry.content: I am a construction engineer by education, and my story with SAP began recently, when I lost my job as a construction manager. I learned about SAP a year ago (2023) and after the 6-month course, I passed the SAP MM and SAP SD exams. I live in Berlin but I was born in Poland. I try to know the work in Belin as a SAP Advisor and specialize in data research. I even went to interviews at BMW, but they said that they should look for a person who knows how to migrate data from SAP to S/4HANA, which I didn't have during the course. I would like to specialize in querying data from SAP to S/4HANA, but in the contract form per day. I would like to find a boot for automatic knowledge of about 12,000-13,000 pieces of data in a short time. I am looking for an internship as a junior SAP advisor and I would like to work with someone who knows about data migration from SAP to S/4HANA SAP. Have a nice day everyone.

entry.title: How can we change text variable name- for example !VAR00015 here in webi prompt screen?
entry.content: in the prompt screen, the value help is coming through foreign key association and showing text and key values in prompt for that field, can we change the !VAR00015  to some other name which will be more relatable to the user.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

This is an (very, very) old one. Never leave your laptop unattended! 😉

entry.title: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content:
Last week was all about pets, this week is all about tech setups! Use this opportunity to show off your coding setup. This could be your desk, office, or even your favorite development tools (I personally want to see everyone’s favorite VS Code extensions).

To participate, you only need to complete the following steps.

Step 1: Take a picture or screenshot of your development setup. This could be your desk with your favorite knickknacks, your office and how you arrange your room for various purposes, your computer screen showing how you arrange your windows for optimal coding efficiency, or even just your favorite coding extensions or tools that help you develop better code.

 Step 2: Post that picture in the comments of this discussion post before EOD October 6th. If you’ve already posted the picture elsewhere, feel free to link that in the comments.

Step 3 (optional): Peruse the rest of the pictures to get ideas on how you might want to update your own setup.

Be as creative or relaxed as you want, the only thing that’s important is that you have fun.

Personally, I like to have a mobile setup so I can work from whichever seat the wind blows me to that day. I went ahead and shared four of my favorite VS Code extensions in the comments below so check that out if you need some inspiration.

Note: You are not restricted to only post during Friday, October 4th. This is open the entire second week of Devtoberfest, from September 30th through October 6th. We will award points and badges after that time.

Have fun and show us how you code!

entry.title: Re: SSAM Catalog Profile Selection
entry.content:
There is a SAP notes that you can apply

https://me.sap.com/notes/3453270/E

entry.title: Data Center Availability (Provider) of SAP Integration Suite Basic Edition
entry.content:
Hi all,

i'm just wondering, if SAP Integation Suite Basic Edition is really just only available via Provider "Alibaba" and Region "China".  SAP Discovery Center shows me only those region & provider available by now.

entry.title: can we use the same association for value help for two fields?
entry.content:
There's one CDS view which is used in association to create F4 value help,
can we use the same association to generate F4 value help for more than one field?
(if the other fields are mentioned in the base CDS view which is used to create F4 help)
if yes, how to achieve that?

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: I want to share some of my favorite VS Code extensions. Toggle Quotes is so I can easily toggle between the different quotes “ ‘ `, TODO Highlight, because I like to write todos as I code and unless they are highly visible, I will accidentally push them to production, Trailing Spaces so I can see any extra whitespaces after the ends of lines because I have a cat who will walk on my keyboard and add 15 spaces at the end of a line without me knowing, and Color Highlight because I am a frontend developer who isn’t good enough to know what color the random 6 digit hex code is.

entry.title: Re: How to extend the default session timeout for a Fiori Application launched in Portal
entry.content: I think it is because we are in Foundry whereas that SAP documentation referred to Neo

entry.title: Issue LSMW using batch with transaction FB41
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm creating a LSMW using batch input with transaction FB41.

I'm using a transaction i created (see attach 02). 

the field COMPTEUR is used for creating a new document.

but it doesn't work, as the lsmw creates a file with 836 postings instead of one with 418 postings of 2 lines.

i may have some postings with more than 2 lines.

 

 

 

what should i do for having one posting for each COMPTEUR code ?

thanks.

entry.title: Re: Access PostgreSQL from pgadmin 4 from local machine
entry.content: Hi Prasanna, you may refer to https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/postgresql-on-sap-btp-are-you-looking-for-official-blog-posts-blog-index/ba-p/13788533 to see the options: Check the blog post 'PostgreSQL - Activate (create) an extension using pgAdmin tool' and also 'PostgreSQL - (how-to) deploy and use pgAdmin web version'. You may also leverage the Public IP access feature, but this valid for new instances and it will not be possible to deactivate. Regards Antonio

entry.title: How to create F4 help for custom and also for standard fields for webi in CDS?
entry.content: How we can create F4 help for custom and standard fields for webi (web intelligence) in CDS?

entry.title: SAP DRC for Germany - suppliers flows only
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm starting to implement SAP DRC in Germany but the customer would like to activate only the suppliers inbound features. Do I install all OSS SAP notes for Peppol listed in the "2783795 - Electronic Document Processing for Peppol Countries/Regions: Implementation Overview" note and also all the OSS SAP notes listed in the "2690949 - Electronic Document Processing for Germany: Implementation Overview" note?

At this time, I wouldn't install notes also for customer invoices but I would like to minimize the effort.

Thanks and regards,

Francesca

entry.title: Contract pricing for use in both Sales and Service
entry.content:
Hi all, Can a Service order or service quote also reference a sales contract? The background to my question is that we would have one contract with the customer with price agreements covering services and service parts. The same part could be sold in a straight-forward spare parts sales order without any connection to the service department, or it could be used in a service or repair order. In both case it needs to apply the same price agreement.

Can this be achieved through a single contract document, or would we need to create 2 documents: 1 sales contract, and 1 service contract with the same content for those parts that could be referenced by either?

Thank you

Patrick

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Viewer Chart Font Issue
entry.content: I sent you a direct message, you can send it to me that way... Don

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud. How to create OData v4 service for CDS view in Fiori?
entry.content: Thank you.

entry.title: SAP GUI event script
entry.content:
Hello all,

could you please help? I want to set configuration path for sap logon configuration file SAPUILandscapeGlobal.xml to path: "%AppData%\SAP\Common" via OnInstallationEnd event scripting in SAP GUI single installation package. My script/command looks like:

************************************************************

'Create directory C:\Users\%AppData%\SAP\Common
destFolder = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("C:\Users\%AppData%\SAP\Common")

If Not NwEngine.Shell.CreateDirectory( destFolder ) Then
NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteError "Creating directory C:\Users\%AppData%\SAP\Common failed."
End If

'Copy configuraton file from CustomerFiles directory
NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Event: Copying customized SAPUILandscapeGlobal.xml"

srcFile = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SapSrcDir%\CustomerFiles\SAPUILandscapeGlobal.xml")
destFile = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("C:\Users\%AppData%\SAP\Common\SAPUILandscapeGlobal.xml")
If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( srcFile ) Then
NwEngine.Shell.CopyFile srcFile, destFile
End If

'Copy services file
NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "Event: Copying customized services"

srcFile = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SapSrcDir%\CustomerFiles\services")
destFile = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%windir%\System32\drivers\etc\services")
If NwEngine.Shell.FileExist( srcFile ) Then
NwEngine.Shell.CopyFile srcFile, destFile
End If

'Switch off Enhanced Search in setting Visualization 2
If Not NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue("HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Customize\EnhancedSearchMode", "REG_DWORD", "0") Then
NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteError "Writing the registry value HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Customize\EnhancedSearchMode has failed."
End If

'Set Path to local configuration files to C:\Users\%AppData%\SAP\Common
If Not NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue("HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon\Options\PathConfigFilesLocal", "REG_EXPAND_SZ", "%AppData%\SAP\Common") Then
NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteError "Writing the registry value HKLM\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\SAP\SAPLogon\Options\PathConfigFilesLocal has failed."
End If

'Set Path to global configuration files to C:\Users\%AppData%\SAP\Common
If Not NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue("HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon\Options\LandscapeFileOnServer", "REG_EXPAND_SZ", "%AppData%\SAP\Common") Then
NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteError "Writing the registry value HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPLogon\Options\LandscapeFileOnServer has failed."


'Disable user scripting in default
If Not NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue("HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Security\UserScripting", "REG_DWORD", "0") Then
NwEngine.Context.Log.WriteError "Writing the registry value HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\SAP\SAPGUI Front\SAP Frontend Server\Security\UserScripting has failed."
End If

************************************************************

It doen't work and installation faild with error.

Could you please help on this?

Martin.

entry.title: Re: crystal report 13.0.25.3158 installed, Not working Ex...
entry.content:
Use the latest SP 36 from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

Rebuild the project after installing, see my blog on upgrading:

Upgrading a Visual Studio 2008->2022 .NET project with the latest CR .NET SDK packages

Is it a desktop or WEB application?

entry.title: Re: Advanced Event Mesh Adapter : BTP and Integration Suite now features tighter integration with AE
entry.content:
@BarisBuyuktanir Please help me to for Destination Type Queue and Topic.

  • When I choose Topic and Guaranteed message I can enter Topic subscriptions. So are these Subscriptions in Queue?
  • When I choose Direct and Topic. Are these Topic Endpoints in Event Broker.

entry.title: Re: CustomData attribute (data-) not working as documente...
entry.content:
The reason is that Shorthand for customdata does not write those attributes to DOM.

https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/1ef9fefa2a574735957dcf52502ab8d0 

   To set the writeToDom flag in XML views, the aggregation has to be written in expanded notation.

 

I am also looking for a solution to this.

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ Quote 2.0: How to send data to CPI from CPQ u...
entry.content:
Hi @yogananda  , We are working on  CPQ quote 2.0 and integrating to S/4 HANA to create sales order there . The action place order from CPQ quote triggers the event in CPI but failing in CPI :     HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: HTTP operation failed invoking https://xxxxx- xxx.cpq.cloud.sap/api/v1/quotes/81/actions/1924/invoke with statusCode: 403.
The MPL ID for the failed message is : AGb1lUBBEe8azWUIOfh_pM1w0onn.

As per standard documentation , we only have to create/add Post method on action/event  ' Place order' .we have done all the required config in CPQ and other systems but it seems CPI is sending back request to CPQ for quote details and looking for some 'get' method . Do you know the background of it.

Other strange observation is that the action 'Place order' triggers multiple messages in CPI . 

Please suggest .

BR,

Sudha

entry.title: S/4 HANA Hybrid Connector - Classic vs New Product compliance solution
entry.content:
Hello All,

From the Latest EHS Product compliance infodays 2024 we got an update Verisk 3E launched a Hybrid connector to fill the capability gap and connect the classic product Safety solution and S/4 New Dangerous goods Management  solution by which SDS Generation can be performed in classsic product Safety solution  and new S/4  Dangerous goods management would be integrated in the logistics areas.

But two major Queries :-

1) Will this Hybrid connector enable us to transfer the classic DG master data to Advanced DG Basic/Enclosure specific classification and can it be enhanced from there ?  or How exactly should we maintain the DG data whether in classic DG or new DG solution or else in both DG areas from DG specialist perspective ?

2) will this connector allow us to transfer the Advanced New S/4 DG data to Classic Product safety section 14  information ?

  Also do we have any other solution in pipeline other than this Verisk 3E Hybrid connector ?

@Michael_Schalk  @Michael_Mulder  @Chr_Vogler  @Saskia_Kalmbach 

Thanks and Regards,

vasanth.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Techtoberfest 2024
entry.content: In my case, Postman extension is the most useful.

entry.title: Re: Recognizing file name and type in browser after downloading file from Netweaver Gateway
entry.content: Escape was not working in my scenario. When we are giving German special characters(ü, ä) as a file name to download the pdf form which was handling through set headers in GET stream gateway call, it was converting into unexpected file name with %#_. The expectations was to get the same file name with german special characters.

entry.title: Re: Error "FAIL: process disp+work Dispatcher not running" when running docker image
entry.content:
I have same issue. Did you ever find a solution?

I suspect that in my case it is not enough memory. My PC has 32 GB RAM and I have created the .wslconfig file as described in the installation guide on hub.docker.com, but maybe it doesn't work.

The file says 

[wsl2]
memory=20GB
localhostForwarding=true

 

 

and if i look in Docker Desktop, it also seems the container has only 16 gb:

I am totally beginner when it comes to Docker, but I wonder if I can adjust the available memory inside Docker Desktop instead of the solution with the .wslconfi file?

entry.title: Inconsistency in table function FuncAllForecast
entry.content:
Our "Adjust Forecast" app doen't work in our development system.
This is based on some calculation views, for instance TimeseriesKPIQuery, that have interdependencies and one of them are making use of the table function FuncAllForecast.
This table function have an error in the date field and can't be Redeployed:

In this Table Function I find a syntax error and this can't be Regenerated: 

 

Please contact  patric.rubin@axfood.se   for any questions.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skill Initiative
entry.content:
Thanks for writing @RoohiSachan ! I will send you an invitation as soon as possible.

Consider:  A suggestion on how to approach networking and a career search in the SAP ecosystem

entry.title: Re: customers responsibility in both on premise and private cloud scenarios ?
entry.content: A. Middleware

entry.title: Re: customers responsibility in both on premise and private cloud scenarios ?
entry.content: A. Middleware.

entry.title: Re: How to Manage Budgets in Fieldglass
entry.content: Hi @sho1shimizu  - When cost center budgets are used in SAP Fieldglass, messaging can be configured to alert an approver if an invoice would exceed that budget. In that case, the system could require a revision or additional funds to be added before allowing the invoice to be approved, depending on the configuration used. Here is some further information on cost center budgets located on the SAP Help Portal. If you have additional questions on this topic or need assistance, please email support at https://support.fieldglass.com/Fieldglass.

entry.title: Re: digital skills Initiative
entry.content:
Welcome aboard @DCampbellR8 ! Great to hear you found an opportunity that fits well to your pre existing experience. 

Consider: How to figure out if your certification / learning content is free of charge

entry.title: Re: customers responsibility in both on premise and priva...
entry.content:
MIDDLEWARE

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/discovering-sap-activate-implementation-tools-and-methodology/discovering-the-workstreams

entry.title: Re: Database restore / Cleaning activity for SAP S4HANA P...
entry.content:
Hello Nitin,

Q1: you basically asking for deleting all transaction data but keeping the configurations. No, as far as I know, there is no way/tool to do that. That's why we have a Starter System to play the scenarios.

Q2: Yes. SAP offers a paid service called Test Data Refresh (TDR) by copying production tenant to the test tenant, so that you have a test system behaving like a real-world system.

Regards,

George

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud :Key Options for Testing APIs
entry.content:
Hi taranam

I want to use the API key for my S4Hana Cloud (Public Cloud) and am trying to get an API key for my system. I want to use the API key instead of the CSRF token or any other authentication.

Do you have any information on configuring the API keys for S4Hana Public Cloud systems?

Can you please direct me to the documentation? Appreciate your support here.

 

Thank you

Hanu K

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
Re: In SAP Fieldglass, is it possible to autofill time sh...
entry.content: Hi- You can also look into using Rate Schedule. Shifts are included on rate schedules and are used to show the hours and days a worker is scheduled to work and this is defaulted on the time sheet. Rate rules can also be used to auto allocate the time to certain rates on the time sheet. For more information on Rate Schedule Time Sheets, you can visit our SAP Help Portal here. If you have additional questions or need further guidance on this topic, please visit us at https://support.fieldglass.com/Fieldglass.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: #pectoberfest-2024

entry.title: Difference between S/4HANA private cloud vs S/4HANA on-premise
entry.content:
As most people say, S/4HANA private cloud is almost similar to on-premise edition except that the private cloud solution is managed by SAP. What are the other major differences that we need to take into account for? (e.g., topics like security, how to expose custom oData service and how to authenticate, etc.)

With public cloud, when exposing a web API, we usually create the communication arrangements/scenario/system/users. Do we have the same functionality in S/4HANA private cloud edition?

Even though the S/4HANA private cloud is managed by SAP, is it still considered as "on-premise"? Where should the cloud connector software be installed?

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: Football Pet(Atletico de Madrid)

entry.title: Re: Creating an SAP Account (SAP Universal ID) and getting started in the community
entry.content: My name is PHAM VAN CUONG from Vietnam, and I am currently working in the logistics field as an operations staff. When working with partners, I had the chance to learn about the advanced ERP system SAP S/4HANA and I found that modern technologies have really transformed the way that we live and work nowadays. In order to keep up with technology, I really want to learn about SAP S/4HANA modules to upgrade my working skills and change my career in the future. I hope that I can claim one of the SAP Certification vouchers. Please let me know how I can obtain the free certificate at this time. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
Download PDF from adobe form in local system from SAP ODATA backend code in SEGW
entry.content:
The bottom code is working fine in SE38 include program but it failing in segw OData backend code with

sy-subrc = 21[control_flush_error] 

CALL METHOD cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_download
          EXPORTING
            filename                = lv_filename
            filetype                  = 'BIN'
          CHANGING
            data_tab                = lt_pdf
          EXCEPTIONS
            control_flush_error          = 21
            not_supported_by_gui    = 22
            error_no_gui                    = 23
            OTHERS                          = 24.

how can we download the adobe form output pdf in local system in odata backend code via SEGW.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio releases
entry.content:
@Manuelli, we always send e-mails to our customer database inviting them to our release preview webcast, typically hosted a week before the official release date, and also, at the release date, we send another email with all the release highlights; if you would like to share in a private chat your email address. I would make sure you are part of the distribution list. Alternatively, check your spam; the mail comes from the SAP Signavio Team <signavio_success@sap.com>.

Another recommendation is to stay tuned to the SAP Signavio Topic Page, where we always announce events on the carousel tab, or check signavio.com > Events for the preview webcast details. We also publish blog posts with all the release features on both channels at the release date.

I have provided feedback to the team to create a central place with all the dates for 2025 releases. Meanwhile, our Q4 release will take place on Nov 06, and the preview webcast will be on Oct 30. As soon as registration is available, we'll share the links by email and the channels mentioned above. 

Let me know if you have any other questions. Enjoy the weekend!

entry.title: Re: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content:
hi @Sandra_Rossi 

ok thank you, is there also a way to add the field without modifying the RIHAFVR structure?

I tried to add the field, but I get the following error:

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content:
I am Jignesh Mehta. 

I work as a SAP Sales & Distribution Consultant. I started learning SAP back in 2006. I am active on the SDN / SCN Forum since 2007 and initially I was here to learn and lately I am here to share and keep my knowledge brushed up... 

Originally from India I am now living and settled in Germany working as a part of In-House Team of a large corporation. 

Outside of work, I love biking and I am soon going to join a fitness studio to maintain (& build) lean body mass before it is too late... :). 

Thanks,

entry.title: Accounting Determination for Credit Memo in Portuguese Scenario
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

In the Portuguese scenario, when I need to cancel an invoice that has already been sent to the customer, it is necessary to create a Credit Memo to reverse the invoice.

The issue is that for Credit Memos, a different G/L account must be used to comply with legal requirements in Portugal. Credit Memo Invoices must be associated with a "Discounts and Rebates" account, depending on the VAT.

In the configuration for Automatic Account Determination, I used the condition table 017 - Sales Org./Item Cat./Acct Key to determine the G/L account for the item category related to the Credit Memo process. This works for revenue but not for taxes.

Where can I change the account determination for taxes in this case?

Best regards,
Alynne.

entry.title: Re: Real Talk with Claire | Application Development & Automation Track Lead
entry.content: Thanks for such a nice blog @chingweitseng ! Even though my background is mostly functional (SD & MM), I love programming and SAP Build is something I felt in love with since day 1. Now with GenAI, the sky is the limit! Looking forward to see what are the new features in TechEd.

entry.title: LMS Calendar invites
entry.content:
Hi!

we are having some issues where users are missing the calendar invite for classes they sign up for in LMS. because they come in separate emails. When a user registers for a class in LMS, they will receive 3 email notifications below, we have "Enable Vcalendar attachments" and "Send Vcalendar attachments as calendar invite" Turned on in our system 

  1. AMD Training: Notification of Registration / Enrollment
  2. Calendar invites to book your calendar
  3. The ics file in a separate email (this one is attached in the AMD Training: Notification of Registration / Enrollment before I enabled the setting.)

Three emails for one class is a bit much.. Ideally would be registration email with calendar invite/ in one email without the .ics attachment, and also the ability to customize the calendar invite to include teams link at class level would be useful. Different classes will have a different link. do we have any options to consolidate these notifications?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere basic trial - login issue
entry.content:
Hi

I can't login with below details and I getting session ended with in a second.

Thanks for your interest in SAP Datasphere! You’ve just taken your first step towards unleashing the power of your business data.

First things first, here are your account details:

Your User ID: GE118697
Your Password: ObB58a7GbV1!

We’ve also included a guide with some helpful steps as you’re getting started.

You will have access to this basic trial for 30 days.

Over the next month, we’ll be checking in with a few tips and reminders to help you get the most from your basic trial.

Thanks,

Kanna.

entry.title: Hello
entry.content: Hey Everyone

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi all, I am from Malaysia, currently living in British Columbia, Canada. Once again thank you for creating this wonderful community platform, I am looking forward to connect with others from BC, Canada.

entry.title: Get all attachments via API is not visible
entry.content:
Attachments added via the API and the SAP user interface to a to a supplier invoice are only visible one by one with this parameter:

/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/GetAllOriginals?BusinessObjectTypeName='BKPF'&LinkedSAPObjectKey='123 10000000272024'

How can I retrieve the list of all attachments? When I try this via Postman:

API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/GetSAPObjectDocumentType?SAPObjectType='BKPF'

It returns empty because "SAPObjectType": "" for the uploaded attachments.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Calling last calling program in the stack
entry.content: You didn't give any debug details, did you? As I said, you can see by debug that after leaving the selection screen, you go back to ZPROGRAM1 directly after CALL TRANSACTION 'ZUPLOADRPA' in the PAI of the screen 400, and after the PAI of the screen 400 it goes to the PBO of the screen 400 and displays it. If not, please explain what you see during your debug.

entry.title: Re: diference between SAP C user Id and S user Id
entry.content: Bro dont misguide people. Its ur time waste also my time waste by reading ur reply.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: This is my rubber duck I use when debugging 🙂

entry.title: Re: Get all attachments via API is not visible
entry.content: I've used the attachment API to retrieve the list of attachments with the GetAllOriginals function.

entry.title: Re: Generate eDocument from old invoices : SAP DRC Romania
entry.content: Hello Folks this is not the correct way, please note this has to be done in he EDOC_COCKPIT, so here you have to create a variant and in that you have to tick the check box of not yet created, proivide all the details like date range and if more required you can give the document type and fiscal year, etc, click on execute and you will get the list of invoices if it is eligible it will show you as created and than select those documents and click on create icon at the top of that table, till will create e-docs and it will be visible in cockpit.

entry.title: Two-Tier ERP Master Data Replication Options
entry.content:
SAP Two-Tier ERP Integration

Integration is essential in Two-Tier scenarios. A comprehensive understanding of end-to-end business processes, including both master data and transactional data flows, is crucial for ensuring customer success. It's important to identify and address integration requirements early in the process. SAP S/4HANA Cloud will also need to be integrated with various other solutions within the customer's system landscape.

Data is broadly categorised as three areas. Master data, Transactional data, and Configuration data. Here in this blog we will be looking at master data replication options for Two-Tier ERP.

Master Data Replication

Master data is the core data that is absolutely essential for running operations within a business enterprise or unit. It is data about key business entities that provides context for business transactions and operations.

Master data replication between headquarters and subsidiaries is essential for following reasons:

  • Data Consistency: Ensures that both headquarters and subsidiaries have access to the same up-to-date information, minimizing discrepancies and errors in data.
  • Improved Decision Making: Provides a unified view of critical business information, facilitating more informed and accurate decision-making across the entire organization.
  • Operational Efficiency: Streamlines processes and operations by maintaining synchronized data, reducing the need for manual data entry and reconciliation.
  • Enhanced Collaboration: Promotes better collaboration between headquarters and subsidiaries by ensuring everyone is working with the same set of data.
  • Regulatory Compliance: Helps in maintaining compliance with regulatory requirements by ensuring that all parts of the organization adhere to the same standards and data practices.
  • Cost Savings: Reduces costs associated with data management, storage, and maintenance by avoiding duplicate efforts and ensuring data is only entered once.
  • Customer Satisfaction: Ensures that customer information is consistent and accurate across all touchpoints, leading to improved customer service and satisfaction.

Master Data Replication Option 1 - Master Data Integration (MDI)

Customers with following cases should opt for MDI

  • Customers with Headquarter in private cloud and multiple subsidiaries in public cloud
  • Customers utilizes other SAP cloud solutions or non-SAP solutions that needed integration
  • Customers with requirement to harmonize master data across their system landscape
  • Customers who have business technology platform account

Master Data Integration (MDI)

The SAP Master Data Integration service is a cloud service that enables you to handle distributed and federated sets of master data in a heterogenous landscape. Thus, SAP Master Data Integration is the central point for master data integration with the Intelligent Suite.

The service uses SAP One Domain Model as the exchange format to achieve a consistent view of master data across end-to-end business processes in the integrated Intelligent Suite.

SAP Master Data Integration provides reliable real-time replication in a hub-and-spoke approach. This allows every business application to have its own copy of the relevant master data.

 

                                                                                                       

MDI guiding principles

 Central Integration Point

MDI follows central integration point, often called a hub-and-spoke model, MDI acts as centralized system (hub) to manage data exchanges between multiple systems (spokes). Instead of connecting systems directly to each other which comes with centralised management, scalability, reduced complexity, and easy error handling.

One Domain Model

The SAP One Domain Model is an integrated data model that standardizes the representation of business objects across the SAP ecosystem. ODM ensures that these business objects are defined consistently across all SAP applications, including SAP S/4HANA, SAP SuccessFactors, SAP Ariba, and others.

ODM decouples from application specifics, provides well defined semantics for business objects.

 

Predefined Integration Flows

Predefined Integration Flows are ready-to-use, out-of-the-box integration scenarios designed to connect different systems efficiently. These flows are created based on best practices and include mappings, transformations, and communication settings, reducing the time and complexity involved in building custom integrations. They ensure a seamless exchange of data between applications like SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, and Ariba.

Master Data Replication Option 2 – Data Replication Framework

Customers with following cases should opt for MDI

  • Customers with Headquarter in private cloud and subsidiaries in public cloud
  • Customers has requirement to integrate only S/4 solutions
  • Customers with simple landscape

Data Replication Framework

  • The Data Replication Framework (DRF) is a local business object change event processor that decides which business object instances will be replicated to defined target systems. 
  • The DRF is complemented by the key mapping framework and the value mapping framework to support non-harmonised identifiers and code lists.
  • DRF is hosted on SAP S/4HANA OP which doesn’t require additional license
  • Applicable only for SAP S/4HANA applications

The options presented here are not the only approaches to data replication, but they represent the most relevant and prioritized solutions.

entry.title: Re: Hello
entry.content: hi, good day

entry.title: Re: How and where do you start a consulting career in SAP?
entry.content: Thankyou David

entry.title: Re: Get all attachments via API is not visible
entry.content:
The response from GetAllOriginals only concerns a single LinkedSAPObjectKey. I would like to retrieve all attachments for all the documents.

Is there something I might be missing? Thank you for your help, I appreciate it."

entry.title: Re: Get all attachments via API is not visible
entry.content: There isn't an API to look at all attachments, you must designate which business object is of interest.

entry.title: SAP Mobile Application for SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I would like to know if we can enable or connect any service and access SAP S/4 HANA Public Cloud System through mobile phone using SAP application.

As I am aware we can access the system using our Internet Mobile Applications like chrome, safari etc., but can we connect our system with SAP application and access it and perform our daily tasks and activity?

Would appreciate all the responses that can help me on same. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Service

entry.title: Re: Get all attachments via API is not visible
entry.content: Would a CDS view be a solution to retrieve documents and their attachments?

entry.title: Re: 🟠 UI5 Freestyle: TypeScript E2E Development - from zero to hero in 1hr!
entry.content: Please find the validation tutorial for the session here: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/devtoberfest2024-week1-frontend-session-validation.html

entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to talk to someone on Cloud IAG topic. My PE customer is looking for a trial subscription of Cloud IAG to explore the benefits and capabilities. Please let me know where can I get more information on this.

entry.title: Re: can we use the same association for value help for tw...
entry.content:
yes, you can.

just do like the first one.

entry.title: Re: JZ00L: Login failed. Examine the SQLWarnings chained to this exception for the reason(s).
entry.content: for me, this error was coming while accessing ASE database . When we had disabled the password encryption then this error has gone away. Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Fiori standard application similar to transaction FB7...
entry.content:
Dear mredula,

The easiest way to find a fiori app for a standard t code is to execute t code /n/ui2/flp from SAP screen. It will open the fiori app page. Please enter the standard t code in the app finder on the top. You can then add it into your favorites.

Thanks
Avnish

entry.title: Re: NSQ Meetup on Thu, Sept 26 - Who is in / Where to meet?
entry.content: It was great to hang out with folks in NSQ @caseydevlin @jerryjanda @craigcmehil@jimjaquet

entry.title: What’s new for regulatory changes (AUSAPE onsite workshop in Madrid)
entry.content:
Regulatory changes have a significant influence on industries and businesses, and can impact everything from operating costs to market competitiveness and consumer trust. 

Learn about the latest regulatory changes and enhancements from Gema Moraleda, Local Product Manager at SAP for Human Experience Management. Hear directly from SAPIMSA, SAP partner, about the migration to SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA.

Explore the agenda and find out more interesting sessions on successful migration use cases!

Registration link

entry.title: Re: how to add a field in ALV of transaction IW47
entry.content: This error happens because you use TYPES, but you should use DATA here. It seems that you have tried "DATA ztest TYPE ztest" so I guess that it didn't work, what error message did you get?

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content:
Hello,

I don' have a pet by myself, but this is Lucy. The dog of my mother in law. And sometimes I work from there and Lucy comes by.

CU

Michael

#petoberfest #devtoberfest

entry.title: What’s new for regulatory changes (AUSAPE onsite workshop in Barcelona)
entry.content:
Companies and organisations need to stay abreast of regulatory changes and adapt their operations to remain compliant and competitive in the face of evolving regulatory landscapes.

Would you like to know about the enhancements made in the last month? Do you have any questions about Human Capital Management solution from SAP? Are you curious about migration to SAP HCM for SAP S/4HANA (SAPIMSA, SAP partner)?

Visit the onsite AUSAPE event in Barcelona and join the presentation of Gema Moraleda, Local Product Manager at SAP for Human Experience Management. 

Explore the agenda and find out more interesting sessions on successful migration use cases!

Registration link

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Contest
entry.content:

On the page https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/devtoberfest2024-week1-tooling-session-validation.html the sessions are not linked.

But via this page https://community.sap.com/t5/devtoberfest/eb-p/devtoberfest-events?calendar=true there are linked.

KR

Michael

entry.title: Re: 🟢 Understand the Clean Core Extensibility Options for Cloud ERP
entry.content:
Okay thanks. But if that's right, then I'm wondering why:

  • SAP Help still documents the RFC-based approach?
  • There doesn't appear to be any mention of cl_abap_parallel in SAP Help, or in any SAP-authored blogs?

entry.title: Adding Standard MARA/MARC fields for CRUD operation in API_PRODUCT_SRV
entry.content:
Hi Community Members, 

I am working on a requirement to extend API_PRODUCT_SRV (on-Prem) with few missing standard MARA & MARC fields (Not the Z-FIelds) listed below.

Field NameReference Table
RMATP_PBMARA
PROD_SHAPEMARA
MO_PROFILE_IDMARA
OVERHANG_TRESHMARA
BRIDGE_TRESHMARA
BRIDGE_MAX_SLOPEMARA
HEIGHT_NONFLATMARA
DATUMMARC
SCM_STRA1MARC
SCM_RRP_TYPEMARC
SCM_HEUR_IDMARC
SCM_MATURITY_DURMARA
SCM_SHLF_LFE_REQ_MAXMARA
USEQUMARC
SHFLGMARC
PPSKZMARC
MHDLPMARA
RDMHDMARA
RBNRMMARA
autruMARC

I extended associated CDS entities like A_PRODUCT, A_ProductPlant etc with the respective fields from MARA & MARC and able to get the fields in Payload.

GET call works fine for these newly added fields however, CREATE & UPDATE operation is not working and the fields are not updated. Also, I could not find any BADI to to map these fields during create/Update. 

Really appreciate any suggestions on this issue. Thanks in advance.   

Pradeep

ABAP Extensibility API OData SAP Gateway 

__PRESENT

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
Re: Report to view purchase orders and corresponding invo...
entry.content:
Hello, 

I am not sure if you got this answer, but this is the best you can do with your standard access. 

Like mentioned by others you might need to download multiple reports. 

ME2N - PO Report 

ME80FN - Invoice Document Number 

FBL1N - Invoice received Date, Invoice Posted Date, Invoice due Date, Payment date and Ne Due date according to your payment setup with the Supplier (for this you need Vendor account number, not the Vendor code used while creating a PO) 

Combination of these three will give you what you need, if you are going to doing this report frequently, I would suggest creating a custom report. 

Hope this helps

entry.title: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 2 Contest Activities
entry.content:
Please note that while we are publishing contest activities on Friday, September 27th; many badge assignments won't be active in the system until Monday, September 30th.  If you happen to complete a contest activity before the badge is active, that's OK. You'll still get credit for it. It just won't show up in your gameboard totals until the new badges are activated and assigned.

If you are looking for Week 1 activities, they can be found here: Devtoberfest 2024 Week 1 Contest Activities - SAP Community

Welcome to Devtoberfest 2024! We are back again this year with 4 weeks of fun and learning! Starting on September 23rd you can take part in the Devtoberfest contest (CONTEST OFFICIAL RULES HERE) and collect points for tutorials, quizzes and live sessions! Collect as many points as possible until the 25th of October and qualify for prizes such a trip to next year's SAP TechEd in person experience! For general information check out the overview about taking part in the contest here: Devtoberfest Contest - SAP Community Groups 

The table below shows you the points you can earn in the second week of Devtoberfest! Every week we will post an update with the new activities that will get you points in the contest! Each activity will earn you a badge applied to your SAP Community ID and points that you can track on the “for fun only” Devtoberfest Gameboard. The scavenger hunt is also back this year! The tutorials, quizzes and fun activities to earn even more points as part of the scavenger hunt will be posted here in week 3. And don't forget about Fun Friday Activities.  This week's Fun Friday activity will be Techtoberfest - Use this opportunity to show off your coding setup. This could be your desk, office, or even your favorite development tools.

List of activities for contest week 2: 

DAYBADGE CODECONTENTPOINTS
Monday   
Monday#AEC2D3Devtoberfest 2024 - ABAP, Week 2, Sept. 301200
Monday#9AD6C0Get to Know SAP BTP, ABAP Environment150
Monday#6E4046Create an ABAP Core Data Services (CDS) View in SAP BTP, ABAP Environment450
Monday#A28668Enhance an ABAP Core Data Services (CDS) View in SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) ABAP Environment600
Monday#5D5859Create Business Configuration Maintenance Object300
Monday#7662BEDevtoberfest 2024 - CAP, Week 2, Sept. 301200
Monday#E1B446Introduction to Application Development Using CAP70
Monday#D8EAFESet Up SAP Business Application Studio200
Monday#010101Build a CAP Application300
Monday#FAFAFAAdd SAP Fiori Elements UIs 300
Monday#E9E8F0Add Custom Logic100
Tuesday   
Tuesday#201926Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling, Week 2, Oct. 11200
Tuesday#99CEF1Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling, Watch DMS Video300
Tuesday#DC879BSetup SAP Build Code in SAP BTP100
Tuesday#212327Create a Full-Stack Application with SAP Fiori UI using Joule in SAP Build Code300
Tuesday#C3516FSubscribe to SAP Build Process Automation150
Tuesday#BA61B3Create a Business Process100
Tuesday#A8416DCreate and Configure Forms250
Tuesday#905335Create a Process Condition100
Tuesday#19E5E5Run the Business Process150
Wednesday   
Wednesday#1B573DDevtoberfest 2024 - Integration, Week 2, Oct. 21200
Wednesday#28B07ALearn about SAP Event Mesh100
Wednesday#B894A3Create Instance of SAP Event Mesh150
Wednesday#10302ACreate Queues and Queue Subscriptions for SAP Event Mesh300
Wednesday#030501Send and Receive Test SAP Event Mesh150
Wednesday#C6CAB4Create an Application for Producing Messages200
Wednesday#27302BCreate an Application for Receiving Messages200
Wednesday#62BAC4Create App for Sending and Receiving Messages Using a Java-Based Client450
Thursday   
Thursday#190005Devtoberfest 2024 - MAD (ML, AI & Data), Week 2 - Oct. 32400
Thursday#FEF5F4Use Trial to Set Up Account for Data Attribute Recommendation and Download Postman Sample Files50
Thursday#2A2D30Install Postman REST Client50
Thursday#DAD8D6Set Up Postman to Call Data Attribute Recommendation APIs50
Thursday#FCEDEDUpload Data to Data Attribute Recommendation150
Thursday#D3C4D4Use Data Attribute Recommendation to Train a Machine Learning Model150
Friday   
Friday#53FA4CDevtoberfest 2024 - Frontend, Week 2, Oct. 041200
Friday More Activities being added soon. Please check back.
